atomic_facts.fact: White text appears on a purple background describing a baking process.
The text mentions a 4th attempt at making gluten-free Viennese Whirls.
The text describes previous failed attempts regarding taste and appearance.
A bright lens flare is visible in the center at the start of the chunk.

state_changes: Text overlay fades in and becomes fully legible.
The text orientation shifts from slightly tilted to straight.
The bright central flare diminishes as the text becomes clearer.
ocr: FOR ALL THOSE WHO'VE BEEN FOLLOWING....
You'll know this is my 4th attempt at making gluten-free Viennese Whirls.
The first two attempts tasted great (but looked awful).
The third attempt looked great (but tasted awful).
And then the 4th attempt conquered everything...

ocr: 1. Cream butter, marge, vanilla & sugar together.
2. Add flours and mix in well.
3. Pipe 2 inch circles onto baking parchment.
4. Bake for 15 mins in a 190 Celsius oven.
